description: On multi-flyby missions like Cassini, the CAPCOM event ticker shows every flyby as the generic label 'FLYBY' with an empty note — even though the mission data (flight.events) carries specific per-event labels such as 'Venus #1 — gravity assist' and 'Saturn orbit insertion', plus multi-sentence descriptions. The rich per-event text is present in the data but never reaches the ticker. The merge happens in mergeFlightEvents() in src/lib/mission-event-merge.ts: when an event supplies its own label/description, those must override the generic labelMap/DEFAULT_FLIGHT_LABELS fallback; fall back to the type-based label/note only when the event doesn't supply its own. Event severity/colour stays driven by the event type.
